channel.title: Io-Uring on UAPI Group Kernel Feature Wishlist
channel.description: Recent content in Io-Uring on UAPI Group Kernel Feature Wishlist

item.title: Extend `io_uring` with classic synchronous system calls
item.description: The io_uring subsystem is open to adding classic existing synchronous system calls (e.g. setns() or mount() or other) to io_uring. They also said they would support adding new functionality into io_uring that is not exposed through system calls yet.
